required_tools: GitHub push/PR only after explicit safe gate
required_verification: baseline local verification plan before implementation
notes: Developer backend UI module entitlement, independent login configuration, true Host portal login, system announcement lifecycle, system config/API Key lifecycle, platform plan lifecycle, AI/OCR configuration lifecycle, third-party integration/security/monitoring/logs lifecycle, payments/invoices/storage observability, enterprise subscription plan lifecycle, finance dashboard real-summary data, and now contract construction progress receipt coverage are covered by real Chrome. S26 covers creating a construction contract progress receipt on the same contract detail page and confirming amount/description read-back while preserving attachment/procurement/subcontract upload-download-delete coverage. Per the user's latest confirmation, WMS inventory alert / 库存预警 is out of product scope and must not be restored or included in future acceptance matrices; labor risk warnings, system announcement warning type, and face-recognition thresholds remain unrelated and intact. Product Green remains Yellow until production DNS/reverse-proxy/certificate validation, real third-party face gateway credentials, and exhaustive historical-page CRUD/upload/download coverage are complete.
phase_1_required_gates: Claude CLI worker audit or test evidence
browser smoke for module visibility when feasible
